# NY Spotlight Report: 7-Day Content Calendar
**Week of March 25-31, 2026**

---

## **TUESDAY, MARCH 25**

### **Platform: WordPress**
**Topic:** AI Automation ROI Calculator  
**Headline:** "How I Built a $12K/Month Passive Income Stream Using 3 AI Tools (Complete Breakdown)"  
**Body Hook:** Lead with specific numbers. Show the math: Tool A saves 15 hrs/week × $50/hr = $750/week passive value.  
**CTA:** "Get the exact automation stack I use → [Grab ProFlow AI for $97/mo](https://nyspotlightreport.com/proflow) (includes my setup templates)"  
**Best Time:** 8:47 AM EST  
**Secondary CTA:** "Browse other automation tools → [Visit the Store](https://nyspotlightreport.com/store)"

---

### **Platform: Twitter (X)**
**Topic:** Daily AI Win  
**Tweet:** "Most people spend $2,400/year on tools they don't use. I consolidated 7 apps into 2 using AI automation. Saved $1,800 in 60 days. The secret? One decision: which tasks repeat? 🤖 [Full breakdown](https://nyspotlightreport.com/store)"  
**Best Time:** 12:15 PM EST

## **WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26**

### **Platform: LinkedIn**

**CTA:** "Want the exact workflow? → [ProFlow Growth Plan $297/mo](https://nyspotlightreport.com/proflow) includes VA replacement templates"  
**Secondary CTA:** "Explore more automation tools → [Store](https://nyspotlightreport.com/store)"  
**Best Time:** 9:15 AM EST  
**Target:** 500+ connections, comment within 1 hour
